name: pm-core
description: 13 PM persona skills (senior-pm, delivery-manager, program-manager, agile-coach, scrum-master, sprint-retrospective, and Jira/Linear/Notion/Confluence/Productboard/Atlassian experts) with a bundled 53-skill reference library (discovery, execution, strategy frameworks, GTM, career) available as sibling REFERENCE.md folders.
